name: 扔錢/甩卡羞辱
name_en: Throwing Money / Tossing Card as Humiliation
description: 用金錢羞辱對方，暗示對方可以被收買。被拒絕後反而凸顯女主的骨氣和自尊。
tags: 銀行卡或現金被扔出/甩回的動作，象徵性地拒絕被金錢定義

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: There's 200,000 in the card. That's enough to cover your compensation. / Stop pretending. Who needs your dirty money? / Take your filthy money. I don't need it.
examples.context: 銀行卡或現金被扔出/甩回的動作，象徵性地拒絕被金錢定義
